radar.title: 把每個訊號轉成製作問題
radar.detail: 它是否適合現有頻道、擁有可安全使用的素材，以及是否給觀眾一個具體的停留理由？

radar.title: 旅遊素材：第一次參與的攻略
radar.detail: 不做全天流水帳；改用具體問題：要先知道甚麼、怎樣參與、哪些可以跳過。

briefs.title: Daily Asset Brief: Japan Field Notes — Winter Night
briefs.summary: This brief outlines the audio asset generation plan for July 20, 2026, focusing on the 'Japan Field Notes — Winter Night' package. Assets are balanced between ambient travel fusions for the Field Notes system and evocative dramatic cues to expand our AI character drama bank, supporting our ongoing investment channel validation.
prompts: Duration: 2:15. BPM: 65. Instruments: Traditional shakuhachi flute, sparse acoustic koto, gentle wind chimes, and ambient winter wind foley. Arrangement: Minimalist and spacious ambient landscape, slowly building with warm sub-bass pads. No vocals. Clean fade-out ending at 2:10.

Duration: 3:00. BPM: 82. Instruments: Warm Rhodes electric piano, vinyl crackle, subtle snow-crunch foley, and a laid-back boom-bap drum loop. Arrangement: Lo-fi hip-hop track capturing a late-night Tokyo alleyway in the snow. No vocals. Seamless loop point at 2:56.

Duration: 1:45. BPM: 60. Instruments: Melancholic solo grand piano, cello ensemble, and faint distant train station announcements under wet reverb. Arrangement: Minimalist, neoclassical dramatic cue for reflective AI character dialogue. No vocals. Clean decay ending.

Duration: 2:00. BPM: 55. Instruments: Bittersweet female hummed vocal (no lyrics, melodic sighing), intimate nylon-string acoustic guitar, and soft analog synthesizer drone. Arrangement: Intimate, close-mic performance for AI character drama emotional climax. Features clear, non-lexical vocal hums. Clean ending.

Duration: 2:30. BPM: 110. Instruments: Rhythmic shamisen, modern digital synth plucks, and a driving mid-tempo shiko drum beat. Arrangement: Upbeat electronic-traditional fusion representing a neon-lit winter street in Osaka. No vocals. Seamless loop point at 2:24.

Duration: 1:50. BPM: 75. Instruments: Deep, resonant low taiko drum strikes, tension-building pizzicato strings, and cold metallic sound design drones. Arrangement: Cinematic suspense cue designed for high-stakes AI character confrontation in a winter setting. No vocals. Sharp, sudden stop ending.

briefs.title: Daily Music Asset Brief - 2026-07-21

meta.licensing: No licensing rights claimed. Internal R&D and platform testing purposes only.

briefs.summary: This brief structures today's music asset collection around the 'Food Close-up / Café' visual package, generating warm, sensory, and acoustic textures. To optimize platform workflows, we are actively validating tracks for our primary investment channel, supplying organic, acoustic-electronic hybrids for the travel 'Field Notes' system, and banking vocal-inclusive dramatic stems specifically designated for the AI character drama archive.
prompts: Duration: 60 seconds. BPM: 82. Instruments: Soft felt piano, muted acoustic guitar, warm upright bass, subtle vinyl crackle. Arrangement: Gentle, repetitive melodic loops optimized for close-up food preparation videos. Starts with solo piano, introducing a cozy, rhythmic café groove at 0:15. No vocals. Ends with a clean, fading piano chord.

Duration: 45 seconds. BPM: 112. Instruments: Acoustic ukulele, brushed snare, glockenspiel, shaker, bouncy acoustic bass. Arrangement: Bright, cheerful, and light-hearted. Fast-paced fingerpicking intro leading to a full, breezy café patio theme that maintains high energy. No vocals. Ends on a clean, decisive acoustic strum.

Duration: 90 seconds. BPM: 120. Instruments: Minimalist analog synthesizers, muted plucks, steady deep sub-bass, clean electronic hi-hats. Arrangement: Sleek, analytical, and professional electronic track designed as an investment channel backdrop. Gradual, mathematical build with rising synth pulses and a highly structured midsection. No vocals. Loop point at 1:20.

Duration: 75 seconds. BPM: 95. Instruments: Charango, ambient field recordings of wind and distant footsteps, nylon-string guitar, soft synth pads. Arrangement: Organic, travel-inspired hybrid theme for the Field Notes system. Intro starts with field textures, transitioning into a warm acoustic progression, building to a reflective, open-air climax. No vocals. Clean fade ending.

Duration: 120 seconds. BPM: 70. Instruments: Solo melancholic grand piano, cinematic cello, atmospheric reverb. Vocals: Clear, wordless, haunting female soprano vocalizations (specifically labeled for AI character drama). Arrangement: Sparse, emotionally heavy, starting with solo piano, introducing the vocal layer at 0:30, and swelling with a tragic cello line at 1:10. Ends on a long, decaying piano sustain.

Duration: 90 seconds. BPM: 80. Instruments: Dark cinematic analog drones, tense staccato violins, distorted bass pulses. Vocals: Low, rhythmic whispering and heavy, rhythmic breathing (specifically labeled for AI character drama suspense). Arrangement: Tense, suspenseful atmosphere building from quiet isolation to a sudden, dramatic peak. Ends on a sudden, sharp cut off.

briefs.title: Travel Guide Utility & Field Notes Asset Package
briefs.focus: A versatile utility music package optimized for travel field notes, geography-based narratives, and AI character drama, styled with analytical and sophisticated tones to support an adjacent investment-oriented channel strategy.
briefs.meta: All 10 prompts in this asset package are Gemini R&D conceptual prototypes. No music generation has occurred, and no licensing rights are implied or claimed.
briefs.summary: This asset package provides 10 music prompts designed to accompany spoken travel guides and high-concept narrative content. It balances organic acoustic instrumentation with analytical synthesis, providing clear frequency space for narrator voiceovers, map transitions, and subtle emotional cues.
prompts: Duration: 2:45. BPM: 110. Mood: Optimistic, analytical, and warm. Instrument Constraints: Steel-string acoustic guitar, light synthesized marimba, warm analog pad, and soft shaker. Arrangement: Starts with a solo acoustic guitar pattern, introducing a subtle marimba and synth pad at the first edit point. It builds with a light, steady shaker rhythm through the midsection, resolving to a clean acoustic finish. Edit Points: Natural transitions near 15s (pad swell), 30s (marimba entry), 60s (shaker pattern change), and 90s (tonal shift). Loopable Middle: The section between 1:00 and 2:00 is designed to loop seamlessly. Space for Voiceover: Scooped mid-frequencies leave ample room for narration and ambient location sound recordings.

Duration: 2:50. BPM: 95. Mood: Curious, organic, and exploratory. Instrument Constraints: Nylon-string acoustic guitar, warm upright bass, atmospheric synthetic wind textures, and a soft Fender Rhodes piano. Arrangement: Features delicate fingerpicked guitar and slow, grounding bass notes that slowly build with reflective Rhodes chords in the second minute before a natural fade out. Edit Points: Seamless edit boundaries near 15s (bass pulse entry), 30s (Rhodes chord entry), 60s (subtle harmonic shift), and 90s (bridge breakdown). Loopable Middle: The segment from 0:45 to 2:15 can be looped. Space for Voiceover: The low-mid frequency range is kept quiet and clean to preserve speech clarity.

Duration: 3:00. BPM: 120. Mood: Kinetic, modern, and sophisticated. Instrument Constraints: Plucked synthesizer arpeggios, clean electric bass guitar, muted electric guitar staccatos, and subtle organic rimshots. Arrangement: Starts with a rhythmic synth pattern, developing with steady bass pulses and tight electric guitar accents, reaching a dynamic yet controlled peak at 1:45 before a clean, unresolved ending. Edit Points: Editing points positioned at 15s (percussion drop), 30s (guitar pattern entry), 60s (harmonic drop), and 90s (re-entry of main arpeggio). Loopable Middle: The section between 1:00 and 2:20 is fully loopable. Space for Voiceover: High-frequency transient control ensures narrator clarity over busy transit sound effects.

Duration: 2:35. BPM: 105. Mood: Professional, calculated, and steady. Instrument Constraints: Felt acoustic piano, ticking percussive textures, sub-bass pulse, and evolving atmospheric pads. Arrangement: A driving felt piano pattern is layered over a persistent clock-like ticking, with slow-moving sub-bass notes providing a foundation that gently yields to a sustained, clean piano ring-out. Edit Points: Clean edit markers near 15s (ticking starts), 30s (sub-bass enters), 60s (piano octave shift), and 90s (calm section). Loopable Middle: Loopable from 0:30 to 1:45. Space for Voiceover: Arranged specifically to sit beneath complex statistical data reads or geographical info delivery.

Duration: 2:55. BPM: 80. Mood: Introspective, melancholic, and ethereal. Instrument Constraints: Low drone synthesizer, expressive acoustic cello, glockenspiel, and a processed synthetic vocal hum (non-lyrical, clearly labeled as a synthetic AI character drama element). Arrangement: Begins with a low drone, introducing the cello at the first marker, leading into a sparse, reflective synthetic hum that evokes digital consciousness before resolving on a quiet glockenspiel note. Edit Points: Edit points located at 15s (cello entry), 30s (synthetic hum introduction), 60s (tonal shift), and 90s (minimalist drop). Loopable Middle: Loopable between 1:00 and 2:15. Space for Voiceover: Highly spacious frequency spectrum designed to support dramatic character dialogue.

Duration: 2:40. BPM: 115. Mood: Warm, collaborative, and globally conscious. Instrument Constraints: Synthetic hand percussion (congas and tablas hybrid), acoustic kalimba, nylon-string guitar, and clean glass-like pads. Arrangement: Starts with a sparse kalimba pattern, adding organic-sounding hand percussion and acoustic guitar strumming in the midsection, and concluding on a gentle, clean acoustic decay. Edit Points: Clean transitions at 15s (percussion entry), 30s (pad swell), 60s (rhythm consolidation), and 90s (kalimba solo). Loopable Middle: The segment from 0:45 to 1:55 is loopable. Space for Voiceover: Carefully mixed to allow external field recordings of city noise or nature to sit comfortably alongside speech.

Duration: 1:45. BPM: 110. Mood: Minimal, reflective, and raw. Instrument Constraints: Solo steel-string acoustic guitar with realistic room resonance. Arrangement: An alternate, entirely acoustic and percussion-free rendition of Prompt 1, focusing on clean picking and natural string movement. Edit Points: Clear natural boundaries at 15s, 30s, and 60s, with a gentle, ringing chord ending. Space for Voiceover: Complete transparency for detailed narration or dense travel field notes.

Duration: 1:30. BPM: 120. Mood: Late-night, subdued, and ambient. Instrument Constraints: Muted lo-fi electric guitar, vinyl crackle effect, and a deep sub-bass. Arrangement: A drumless, atmospheric alternate arrangement of Prompt 3, focusing on warm, jazzy electric guitar chords drifting over a steady vinyl crackle. Edit Points: Edit points at 15s, 30s, and 60s, terminating in a quiet fade into vinyl noise. Space for Voiceover: Subdued high frequencies ensure a cozy, intimate frame for spoken-word travel summaries.

Duration: 0:35. BPM: 115. Mood: Dynamic, transitional, and direct. Instrument Constraints: Bright acoustic chime, quick steel-string guitar flourish, upward analog synth sweep, and a warm kick drum hit. Arrangement: A functional cue designed for map transitions or information cards, starting with a rapid synth sweep and chime, peaking at 0:15, and quickly decaying into a lingering high-frequency tail. Edit Points: Distinct peak transition point at 15s. Space for Voiceover: Allows for a quick, clear title-card voiceover during the brief musical transition.

Duration: 2:50. BPM: 100. Mood: Futuristic, mathematical, and contemplative. Instrument Constraints: Granular-synthesized acoustic guitar textures, microtonal digital blips, deep sub-bass, and a processed room-tone hum. Arrangement: Starts with organic acoustic guitar notes that slowly dissolve into granular clouds; a steady, clockwork-like synth pulse enters mid-track, ending abruptly on a clean, sharp microtonal chime. Edit Points: Edits near 15s (glitch texture start), 30s (sub-bass entry), 60s (pulse patterns merge), and 90s (experimental breakdown). Loopable Middle: Not loopable due to progressive mathematical development. Space for Voiceover: Designed as an evocative backing track for tech-forward travel guides or complex AI-driven character segments.

briefs.title: Saidio Music Asset Brief: Investing Explainer Focus (2026-07-23)
briefs.focus: Investing Explainer core assets (with secondary considerations for travel Field Notes and banking AI character drama)
briefs.meta: All 10 prompts are Gemini R&D concept drafts. These prompts do not imply that audio generation has already occurred, nor do they claim any intellectual property or licensing rights for the generated assets.
briefs.summary: This asset package provides highly structured, clean, and forward-moving music designed specifically for financial explainer videos and investment channels. It offers ample dynamic headroom to accommodate voiceover and narration, using precise editing points to allow editors to cut easily to graphics, tables, or segment transitions.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Plucked acoustic guitar, warm electric bass, analog synth pad, soft organic shaker, clean acoustic kick drum. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: Starts with a clean, naked acoustic guitar pluck. At 15 seconds, a warm bass and soft shaker enter. At 30 seconds, a gentle analog synth pad fills the stereo field. The track develops dynamic variation in the middle before dropping back to a quiet acoustic guitar and pad arrangement for a clean, ring-out ending.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transitions and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 1:30.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section between 0:30 and 2:00 can be looped seamlessly.
prompts.narration_room: Excellent. Frequencies between 1kHz and 3kHz are heavily scooped in the mix to leave absolute room for a narrator's voice.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Muted grand piano, ambient electric guitar swells, subtle synthetic cello pad, soft electronic snap percussion. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: Begins with a minimal, repetitive muted piano arpeggio. Subtle guitar swells enter at 15 seconds. High-end snap percussion builds a comfortable rhythm from 30 seconds onward. A low-mid cello pad joins at 60 seconds to add weight. The track maintains this steady state before dropping all percussion at 2:35, ending on a sustained piano chord.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transitions and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 1:45.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 0:30 to 2:20 is loopable.
prompts.narration_room: High. The high frequencies are kept warm and rounded, leaving the crisp top-end open for vocal clarity.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Marimba, pizzicato violins, sub-bass pulse, light organic cabasa, low-volume filtered analog lead synth. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: An intricate marimba pattern opens the track. Pizzicato strings enter at 15 seconds, reinforcing the rhythm. A deep, warm sub-bass pulse joins at 30 seconds. A highly filtered, non-intrusive synth melody drifts in at 60 seconds to provide narrative development. Ends with a sharp, synchronized pizzicato pluck.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transitions and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 2:00.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 0:30 to 2:30 is loopable.
prompts.narration_room: High. Marimba and pizzicato elements are panned hard left and right, leaving the center image open for voiceover.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Fender Rhodes electric piano, airy synthesizer pads, slow acoustic rimshots, warm double bass. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: Sparse Rhodes chords establish the tempo. Warm double bass slides in at 15 seconds. Gentle, airy synthesizer pads wash over the track at 30 seconds, followed by a slow, methodical rimshot rhythm at 60 seconds. The beat falls away at 2:15, leaving a lingering, warm Rhodes chord to fade naturally.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transitions and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 1:30.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 0:30 to 2:00 can be looped.
prompts.narration_room: Excellent. The slow tempo and sparse arrangement offer a highly non-distracting bed for dense financial explanations.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Strummed clean electric guitar, rhythmic bass guitar, synthetic bell plucks, low-pass filtered electronic drum loop. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: A crisp, strummed electric guitar introduces the progression. Bass and a filtered drum loop drop in simultaneously at 15 seconds. Bright, clean bell plucks arrive at 30 seconds to define the main theme. The rhythm strips down to bass and guitar at 1:45 before a final, driving chorus that resolves cleanly on an open guitar strum.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transitions and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 1:45.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 0:30 to 2:00 is loopable.
prompts.narration_room: Moderate to High. Bells and lead elements are mixed at a lower volume level to prevent clashing with voiceover.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Delayed electric guitar harmonics, cinematic sub-bass hits, soft analog synth pulse, sustain violin section. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: Ethereal, delayed guitar harmonics ring out over a silent background. A soft analog synth pulse starts at 15 seconds. Soft cinematic sub-hits emphasize transitions at 30 seconds. Sustained violins add warmth and scale at 60 seconds. The track maintains a spacious, atmospheric depth, ending on a long, decaying guitar delay tail.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transitions and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 2:00.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 1:00 to 2:30 is loopable.
prompts.narration_room: Outstanding. The slow-attack arrangement keeps transient sounds out of the speaker's vocal frequency range.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Plucked acoustic guitar and warm electric bass only. No drums, percussion, or synths. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: A stripped-back, minimalist alternate mix of Core Master 1. It showcases the bare acoustic guitar pluck starting solo, with the warm electric bass entering at 15 seconds. The arrangement progresses quietly and evenly, avoiding any sudden shifts, before ending on a single, long-held acoustic chord.
prompts.edit_points: Clean transitions at 0:15, 0:30, and 1:00.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 0:15 to 1:15 is loopable.
prompts.narration_room: Maximum headroom. Zero mid-to-high frequency synth clutter ensures absolute vocal dominance.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Marimba, organic shaker, soft kick drum, and electric bass pulse. No strings, pads, or lead synths. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: A highly focused, rhythm-only alternate arrangement of Core Master 3. The track relies entirely on the interlocking patterns of the marimba, shaker, and bass pulse to drive momentum. It maintains a constant energy level throughout, before fading gently over the final 10 seconds.
prompts.edit_points: Clean transitions at 0:15, 0:30, and 1:00.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the entire body from 0:15 to 1:15 is loopable.
prompts.narration_room: Maximum. Designed specifically for rapid-fire data delivery, statistics displays, and screen graphics where speech must remain front and center.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Reverse cymbal swell, clean synth pluck, Rhodes piano chord, acoustic guitar strum. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: An information-card bed and transition cue. It begins with an immediate reverse cymbal swell peaking at 3 seconds, resolving into a bright, clean Rhodes chord. A subtle synth pluck and guitar strum play a brief, 15-second rhythmic progression that winds down cleanly to a solid, resolving final chord at 30 seconds.
prompts.edit_points: Clear edit or drop-out points at 0:05 and 0:15.
prompts.loopable_middle: No, this is a linear transition cue designed to play start-to-finish.
prompts.narration_room: High. The cue is designed to sit underneath a quick 15-to-20 second callout, sponsorship message, or transition slide.

prompts.mood: Futuristic, analytical, slightly tense, and high-tech
prompts.instrument_constraints: Granular synthesizer textures, clean muted electric guitar, glitchy electronic percussion, analog sub-bass, sparse electric piano. No vocals.
prompts.arrangement: Atmospheric, granular synth textures rise slowly. At 15 seconds, a muted electric guitar begins a rhythmic pattern. Glitchy, micro-percussion enters at 30 seconds, creating a complex but quiet rhythmic matrix. Sub-bass and electric piano chords drop at 60 seconds to ground the track. Complexity peaks at 2:00 before deconstructing back to a single granular texture.
prompts.edit_points: Natural transition and edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, and 2:00.
prompts.loopable_middle: Yes, the section from 0:30 to 2:00 can be looped seamlessly.
prompts.narration_room: High. While textures are complex, they are mixed wide and low in the frequency spectrum, keeping the center vocal channel entirely clean.

briefs.title: Saidio Daily Asset Brief - AI Character Drama Focus (2026-07-24)
briefs.meta: All 10 prompts in this asset brief are generated for Gemini R&D purposes. No licensing rights are claimed, and no actual audio generation has been executed.
briefs.summary: This asset package provides a diverse selection of acoustic-synthetic hybrid cues tailored for AI Character Drama. The tracks balance computational coldness with human vulnerability, leaving ample mid-range frequency headroom for dialogue, narration, and localized sound design. The package consists of 6 core master tracks, 2 alternate arrangements, 1 utility transition cue, and 1 experimental narrative cue.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Minimalist felt piano, warm analog synthesizer pads, delicate generative glitch-percussion, low-frequency sub-bass pulse. No acoustic drums.
prompts.arrangement: Starts with a solitary piano motif, introducing soft pads at 0:15. Percussion builds a subtle rhythm from 0:30. A melodic shift occurs at 1:00, entering a loopable middle section before stripping down to a solo piano coda from 2:15 to the end.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, 1:45, and 2:15. Features a 60-second loopable middle section between 1:00 and 2:00.
prompts.narration_headroom: Broad EQ pocket in the high-mid range (1kHz - 4kHz) to accommodate quiet, reflective character dialogue and soft voiceover.
prompts.ending: Clean decay of a single sustained piano chord and low synthesizer note.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Plucked marimba, mechanical ticking clock synths, swelling cello lines, deep synth-bass drops. No brass, no drums.
prompts.arrangement: Opens with an isolated ticking motif and marimba. Low cello swells enter at 0:30. The arrangement thickens at 1:00 with deep bass pulses. The tension peaks at 2:00, followed by a gradual reduction of elements to a solo marimba tail.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, 1:30, and 2:00. Features a 60-second loopable middle section between 1:00 and 2:00.
prompts.narration_headroom: Dynamic range optimized to sit beneath urgent, whispered narration or technical computer system sound effects.
prompts.ending: Abrupt, clean stop on a final clock-tick accent.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Warm acoustic solo cello, crystalline bell-like synthesizer tones, slow-swelling granular string textures. No percussion, no piano.
prompts.arrangement: Cello-led theme with soft background granular swells starting at 0:15. Synthesizer bells introduce a delicate counter-melody at 0:30. The texture builds in emotional depth at 1:00, stays consistent through 2:00, and thins out to a warm cello resolution.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, 1:45, and 2:10. Features a loopable section from 1:00 to 1:50.
prompts.narration_headroom: High-mids and presence frequencies are left unoccupied, perfect for heavy dialogue or emotional character monologues.
prompts.ending: Sustained cello note fading naturally into absolute silence.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Plucked acoustic steel-string guitar, metallic synthesizer sweeps, dynamic bowed double bass, sparse digital noise bursts. No electric guitar, no heavy drums.
prompts.arrangement: Starts with dry, sparse acoustic guitar plucks. Synthesizer sweeps enter at 0:15. A steady bowed double bass pulse defines the rhythm from 0:30. Dynamic variations keep the progression evolving from 1:00 onwards, peaking at 2:20.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, 1:45, and 2:20. Features a loopable middle section from 1:00 to 2:00.
prompts.narration_headroom: Acoustic guitar panning leaves a wide, clear center image for dialogue and center-panned narration.
prompts.ending: Clean, ring-out decay of the final acoustic guitar chord.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Warm felt piano, lush ambient synthesizer pads, slow-building orchestral strings. No electronic drums, no digital glitches.
prompts.arrangement: Soft pad introduction. The piano enters with a simple 3-note progression at 0:15. Gentle strings sweep in at 0:30, building a cinematic wall of sound through 1:15. The arrangement maintains a plateau of emotion before dropping back to solo piano at 2:30.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:15, 2:00, and 2:30. Features a loopable middle section from 1:15 to 2:15.
prompts.narration_headroom: Soft-shelled instrumentation allows narration to glide over the top with minimal EQ carving required.
prompts.ending: Sustained piano and pad resonance fading slowly over 5 seconds.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Acoustic harp, cold FM synthesizer bells, sub-bass drones, occasional wooden block percussion. No synthetic snare or hi-hats.
prompts.arrangement: Harp loops open the track. FM bell tones introduce a pointillistic pattern at 0:15. Sub-bass drones enter at 0:30. The middle section adds density with extra harp layers at 1:00, maintaining structure until resolving to a solitary harp motif at 2:10.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:30, 1:00, 1:45, and 2:10. Features a loopable middle section from 1:00 to 2:00.
prompts.narration_headroom: Pitched percussion elements are panned hard left and right, preserving the center for clean voiceover delivery.
prompts.ending: Clean electronic mute on the final harp note.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Solo felt piano only. No synthesizers, no percussion, no strings.
prompts.arrangement: A stripped-back alternate arrangement of Prompt 1. Focuses strictly on a solo, highly expressive piano performance with natural breath and mechanical key-noise. Melodic and fragile throughout.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:15, 0:45, and 1:15.
prompts.narration_headroom: Extremely high headroom; the stark piano arrangement sits perfectly behind heavy, emotional character dialogue.
prompts.ending: Natural decay of the final low key, highlighting the physical mechanical release of the piano keys.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Plucked marimba, mechanical ticking clock synths, and sub-bass pulse only. No cello, no melodic synths.
prompts.arrangement: A stripped-back, rhythm-focused alternate arrangement of Prompt 2. Emphasizes the clinical, mathematical nature of the ticking and marimba patterns, avoiding all warm acoustic strings.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit points at 0:30, 1:00, and 1:30.
prompts.narration_headroom: Excellent mid-frequency headroom; ideal for technical briefings, computer screen readouts, or complex monologues.
prompts.ending: Hard stop on the final tick accent.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Swelling electronic pad, low piano octave, single delayed synthetic chime. No drums.
prompts.arrangement: Designed as a map transition or information-card bed. Opens with a mysterious synth swell, resolves to a solid low piano octave at 0:15, and slowly decays into a single, high, delayed chime note.
prompts.edit_points: Natural edit point at 0:15.
prompts.narration_headroom: Very low density, specifically engineered to support a brief 10 to 15-second narration or transition sound effect.

prompts.instrument_constraints: Generative analog synthesizer sequences, processed violin glissandos, heavily manipulated field recordings of server room hums. No traditional drums.
prompts.arrangement: An experimental narrative master track. Opens with a low, unstable server hum. An irregular synth sequence starts at 0:20. Processed violins begin sliding in pitch at 0:40, creating a feeling of AI cognitive dissonance. The intensity shifts constantly, avoiding traditional loops, but maintaining strict edit structural intervals.
prompts.edit_points: Practical edit points at 0:20, 0:40, 1:20, and 2:10.
prompts.narration_headroom: Challenging soundscape; designed for moments of high tension with sparse, fractured dialogue rather than continuous narration.
prompts.ending: A sudden, clean digital dropout simulating an immediate system shutdown.
